instruction: Some of the Austin release work is already in motion, but the review sync is the missing piece. Please check what's there, read the release notes, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step on the board in place and add only the missing sync on the calendar.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Austin release work is already in place, and the review sync is the missing piece. Review what's there, read the release notes, refresh the handoff file, leave the next step on the board in place and add only the missing sync on the calendar, and leave the rest alone.
